features: Hair Pins Material: Our U shape Hair Bun Pins are made of high quality metal and not easy to break, very durable and useful,comfortable to wear,not easy to break and fade after applying for a long time.

Bobby Pins with Safe Design:There are round balls at both ends of the hair pins, can protect your hair from scratching,not hurt your hair,With wave design of each hair pin, they are elegant and beautiful,with enough resistance and tightening prevent from falling off.

Package Includes: You will receive 200 pieces(approx6 cm/2.36 Inche ) Bobby Pins Hair pins stored in 1 small clear plastic box It is convenient for you to store and carry when you go out for work or traveling.

Hair Clips Wide application:The hair grips fit for most people and different age.Suitable for daily wearing and more occasions,Such as meeting,party,wedding and so onand makes your hairstyle more fashionable.
Quality service:If you are not satisfied with this product or if you have any question, please feel free to contact us. We will try best to solve the problem.
